description: MarketCheck provides automotive data products including vehicle listings, VIN decoding, market analytics, and related datasets across North America and the UK. Its platform is used for search, valuation, inventory, and market-intelligence use cases.
summary: apigee.net exposes a documented MarketCheck Cars HTTP API surface (cataloged via Apigee-hosted base URL) and a hosted MarketCheck MCP server; both require MarketCheck-issued credentials, primarily an API key, with OAuth client-credentials also documented for the broader MarketCheck API.
